chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-143 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w Muhammad Moosa, DSP/SDPO, Pano Aiil and DSP Legal Shafi Muhammad on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. **** Learned Law Officers file a joint statement on behalf of respondents No.3&4, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. DSP, Pano Akil undertakes that in order to maintain law and order situation, necessary police will be deployed in the village of petitioner immediately for the time being. After such undertaking, counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. However, if any law and order issue is created in future, the petitioner party will be at liberty to approach the high-ups of the police for redressal of their grievance in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
